title: ipomoea aculeata var. mollissima
intro: Ipomoea aculeata var. mollissima, also known as smooth-stemmed prickly vine or hairy moonseed, is a plant species in the morning glory family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea aculeata var. mollissima include reducing inflammation, treating fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and teas, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its active compounds.
